title: Brushless RC Cars, 75KM/H High Speed Remote Control Car, 4WD 1:14 Scale All Terrain Off Road Monster Truck, 2.4 Ghz Racing Car Waterproof 2 Battery 50 Min Car Toy for Kids And Adults
features: [2840 Brushless motor & 75KM/H Remote control cars ]: Equipped with a strong brushless electric motor, the speed and lifetime of this radio controlled cars will be greatly increased. With the powerful motor that runs at a high speed of 90-95m/s, you can reach a maximum speed up to about 75KM/H. The brushless motor will last up much longer than brushed motors while using less power! Less power usage means longer battery life!

[Four wheel drive and shockproof RC car]: The monster truck remote control car is equipped with a 4WD shock absorber suspension system and elastic rubber wheels, which make RC buggy truck non-slip and shockproof. This results in excellent protection against collisions and a strong increase in the minimum safe drop height, the stable structure and precision components and offers the protection of the internal electronic components.

[IPX4 waterproof all-terrain off-road RC car]: Equipped with splash-proof ESC / receiver, waterproof protects the RC trucks from splashes of water. The semi-waterproof function allows you to play in any weather. Big gear high friction tyres support high-speed racing on uneven terrain. Make sure you dry and clean the car in time to maximise long-term performance. Monster truck remote control car is suitable for almost complex road conditions and harsh environments.

[3 Wire 17G Digital Servo & 7.4V/1500mAh rechargeable Battery]: 3 Wire 17G Digital Servo, compared with analog servo, digital servo provides higher precision and better-fixed power and anti-shake function, Softer and faster acceleration, and deceleration. we equip high quality batteries which are better than ordinary batteries. Equipped with 2 sections 7.4V/1500mAh high-quality rechargeable batterie, you can enjoy the fun of driving for about 50+ mins a time which depends on the operation.

[2.4GHz Radio Control Off-Road RC Car]: 2.4 GHz full-function zero gravity car: The monster trucks with precise 2.4 GHz radio control system will not be disturbed when driving. The remote control range is 60-85 meters. Full-throttle/responsive steering brings extra stability, allowing rc drift car to perform special maneuvers like turns, drifts, etc. perfectly, which can be used for turns, forwards, backwards, left turns, right turns and more. You can enjoy a real racing experience!
description: Product Description The Great Moments & Outdoor Fun： The perfect 4WD racing toy is a must-have for boys, girls, adults and off road-lovers. The professional transmitter of the radio remote control car brings you a far superior experience. Looking forward to your wonderful moments! Upgrade Brushless Motor: Professional 2840 Brushless Motor, bring you an unimaginable ultimate experience! High RPM: Perform 19240 revolutions per minute that burst out continuous strong power and reach a top speed at 75km/h. Heat Dissipation: Packed with a fully covered metal heat sink to enhance motor heat dissipation so as to extend motor life, and prevent hand touch from burn hazard. Anti-Seize Protection System: When the wheel is stuck, the frequency will be temporarily cut off, effectively protecting the ESC motor. Strong Shock Absorber System: Metal shock absorber: Good shock absorption effect, long life and high performance. Absorb Vibration: Protect electronic components, the off-road climbing performance is superior, and you are not afraidto challenge any site. You can switch freely on mud, sand, stones, rugged mountain roads, etc. Four-wheel Independent Shock, absorbing Suspension System, allows the car to conquer different terrains. Extend Your Play Time： We equip high quality batteries which are better than ordinary batteries. equipped with 2 sections 7.4V/1500mAh high-quality rechargeable batterie, you can enjoy the fun of driving for about 50+ mins a time which depends on the operation. One battery is installed to the car, and the other (extra) battery is supplied as a spare part in the box. Ideal Gift： 4X4 1:14 High-speed Remote Control Race Truck. A great gift for teenagers and adults. It will be the perfect gift box for your loved ones on Birthday and Christmas. Whether for a kid or an adult, there’s no doubt that remote control cars are a lot of fun. They assist in the development of hand-eye coordination. Everyone can’t wait to open the presents after received and is ready to race outdoor. Specification： Size: 8.66 x 11.8 x 4.7 in (1/14) Drive system: 4WD Frequency: 2.4GHz Full Speed: 75km/h Control Distance: about 60-85 meters (no interference and occlusion) Running time: 2*50+ mins (depends on playing operations) Headlight: Come with realistic LED headlights to identify the heading direction of the truck and detect the terrain under dim light, making incredible night driving experiences. Package Includes: 1* 1/14 Scale 4WD radio controlled cars 1* 2.4GHz radio remote control (AA batteries not included) 2* 7.4V1500mAh Li-ion battery 1* USB charging cable 1* User Manual 1* Sticker 1* Spare parts kit

product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Disconnect and take out the battery pack from the vehicle when not in use. This will prevent damagefrom a leaking rechargeable battery pack. To prolong battery life, do not enable the vehicle to be used to a standstill resulting in the battery being completely drained. Fully charge the battery pack beforeeach use. Do not leave battery pack uncharged for a long period of time. Store the battery pack in a dry, clean and cool condition.
